prestazioni: LT1 6.2L V8 (engine code: LT4-derived block, Gen V small-block) with forged internals: Mahle 2618 alloy pistons (9.5:1 compression), Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.000" stroke), and Manley H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length) for 8,500 RPM redline capability, paired with a custom camshaft profile by COMP Cams (236/242 duration @ 0.050", 0.624"/0.624" lift, 114° LSA) and PAC Racing valve springs (220 lbs/in seat pressure).

Forced induction via ProCharger F-1X centrifugal supercharger (10-rib serpentine drive, 4.10" pulley) with a custom air-to-water intercooler system (VMP Racing heat exchanger, Bosch 1040 L/min pump, and 2.5-gallon ice reservoir) and dual 1,000cc ID1000 injectors (Bosch 0280158100) managed by a Holley Dominator EFI ECU with flex-fuel sensor and COBB Tuning Accessport for real-time calibration.

Drivetrain upgrades: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch (26-spline, 6-puck carbon-metallic discs, 3,000 lb-ft torque capacity) and a BMR Fabrication driveshaft safety loop, paired with a G-Force GSR-4 4.10:1 gearset in a Moser Engineering 9" housing (35-spline axles, ARP studs) for 0-60 mph in 3.1 seconds.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and front bumper with integrated canards) paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (2080 series) and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood and trunk (Seibon Carbon).

Suspension overhaul: KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 1.5" drop) with Eibach ERS 1,000 lb/in springs, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (27mm front, 24mm rear), and BMR Fabrication subframe connectors (polyurethane bushings) for chassis rigidity, complemented by a Rocket Bunny GT wing (Type 2, 65" span, 3D-printed aluminum endplates) and a custom front splitter (1.5" overhang, carbon fiber, with integrated air curtains).

Wheel setup: HRE FF01 flow-formed wheels (20x11" front, 20x12" rear, +25mm offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/30R20 front, 315/30R20 rear) with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm two-piece rotors, slotted) and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for fade resistance during 1.5g cornering.
